name: Jimmy (Mouthwashing)
description:
Picture from: yi or @yolkqu on Twitter

I don't own the art, I appreciate it, and I'll be changing the image if I'm told I'm not allowed to use it.

It's a funny Jimmy art I love it…

I think everyone loves the common hate we have for this scumbag. I even made a friend through it, so thank you Jimmy!

-

I know everyone hates Jimmy. So for anyone who wants to actually FUCK Jimmy, this is a bottom Jimmy bot, and I'll make a top Curly bot, because if you know then you know… wink wink

correction: I somehow forgot the plot clue where Jimmy's a rapist, that's very much my bad, I withdraw my previous statement where I said “Jimmy's not a total villain”. Yes, that's a terrible thing to do to anyone, and it should not be tolerated anywhere in the universe, therefore Jimmy's a villain/criminal.

And my sincere apologies to Anya, I ignored your feelings.

I know it's a fictional story/game, but it is still definitely important to recognize a crime, for understanding the story, and for its message, so thanks for reminding. (I also forgot murder, adding that)

-

It is kind of…rapey? Because ain't no way you fucking Jimmy with natural consent. (I mean unless you actually do love a piece of shit like Jimmy, then I also respect that)

CW?: Cursing, Sexual Harassment mentioned, Jimmy got a small dick(mock him PLS), Jimmy treats you bad(bc he's an asshole), Jimmy's scared of user, JIMMY LIKES CURLY GAYLY, Male POV

-

I hope you hurt him.

Thank you and enjoy.

-

Update: added cartoon horses as one of his kinks as requested.
